functions.name: gears.generator.load_json_from_file
documentation: Loads a JSON file from disk and returns the parsed map.

functions.name: gears.generator.get_project_dir
documentation: Return the absolute path of this file's directory.

functions.name: gears.generator.get_master_schema
documentation: Returns the master schema. This will load it from disk and cache in memory.

functions.name: gears.generator.validate_manifest
documentation:
Validates a gear manifest against the master schema.

Expect a jsonschema.exceptions.ValidationError error to be raised on failure.

functions.name: gears.generator.derive_invocation_schema
documentation:
Creates an invocation schema from a gear manifest.
This can be used to validate the files and configuration offered to run a gear.

functions.name: gears.generator.isolate_file_invocation
documentation:
Given an invocation schema, isolate just a specific file.

Useful to validate a single input.

functions.name: gears.generator.isolate_config_invocation
documentation:
Given an invocation schema, isolate just the config portion.

Useful to validate configuration options separately from files.

functions.name: gears.generator.validate_invocation
documentation:
Validates a configuration against a gear's manifest.

Expect a jsonschema.exceptions.ValidationError error to be raised on failure.
